ddls:
CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business indicator */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of the indicator */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the indicator if none is provided */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the indicator is required */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator's purpose and usage */,
  "schema_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schema version when the indicator was defined */,
  "platform_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform version when the indicator was introduced */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the indicator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the indicator */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_platform_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_version_id") REFERENCES platform_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES indicator_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_schema_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("schema_version_id") REFERENCES schema_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., string, number) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, L) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_indicators" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend indicator */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend indicator (e.g., sap.m.DeviationIndicator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color (e.g., sap.m.ValueColor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator being configured */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size configured for the indicator */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend indicator configured for the indicator */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state color configured for the indicator */,
  "configured_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who configured the indicator */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_configurations_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES state_colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_configurations_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trend_indicators ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_configurations_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_configurations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES indicator_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "value" TEXT /* Current value of the indicator */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was recorded */,
  "recorded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was generated */,
  "seen_by_user" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been seen by the user */,
  "seen_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was seen by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schema_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schema version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the schema */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the schema version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the schema version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the platform */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the platform version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_indicators" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the indicator to the dashboard */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was added to the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id", "indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "commented_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_comments_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the tag */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_tags_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)
